 async def task():\n            results.append(f'start-{i}')\n            await asyncio.sleep(0.01)\n            results.append(f'done-{i}')\n        return task\n    tasks = [await make(i) for i in range(5)]\n    await run_tasks(tasks, max_concurrent=2)\n    assert len([r for r in results if r.startswith('done')]) == 5\n    print('Test 1 (normal): PASS')\n\nasyncio.run(test_normal())\n\n# Test 2: Cleanup on SIGINT\nasync def test_sigint():\n    p = pathlib.Path('/tmp/test_results.txt')\n    p.unlink(missing_ok=True)\n    async def make(i, t):\n        async def task():\n            try:\n                with open(str(p), 'a') as f: f.write(f'start-{i}\\n')\n                await asyncio.sleep(t)\n            finally:\n                with open(str(p), 'a') as f: f.write(f'cleanup-{i}\\n')\n        return task\n    tasks = [await make(0, 0.01), await make(1, 5), await make(2, 5), await make(3, 5)]\n    loop = asyncio.get_event_loop()\n    loop.call_later(0.1, os.kill, os.getpid(), signal.SIGINT)\n    await run_tasks(tasks, max_concurrent=2)\n\ntry:\n    asyncio.run(test_sigint())\nexcept KeyboardInterrupt:\n    pass\n\nresults = pathlib.Path('/tmp/test_results.txt').read_text().strip().split('\\n')\nstarted = [r for r in results if r.startswith('start')]\ncleaned = [r for r in results if r.startswith('cleanup')]\nprint(f'Test 2 (SIGINT): started={len(started)}, cleaned={len(cleaned)}')\n# Every started task should have cleanup\nfor s in started:\n    i = s.split('-')[1]\n    assert f'cleanup-{i}' in results, f'Missing cleanup for task {i}'\nprint('Test 2 (SIGINT): PASS')\n\n# Test 3: Task exception - other tasks still get cleanup\nasync def test_exception():\n    results = []\n    async def good(i):\n        async def task():\n            try:\n                results.append(f'start-{i}')\n                await asyncio.sleep(0.5)\n                results.append(f'done-{i}')\n            finally:\n                results.append(f'cleanup-{i}')\n        return task\n    async def bad():\n        async def task():\n            await asyncio.sleep(0.05)\n            raise ValueError('boom')\n        return task\n    tasks = [await good(0), await bad(), await good(2)]\n    try:\n        await run_tasks(tasks, max_concurrent=3)\n    except ValueError:\n        pass\n    # task 0 and 2 started and should
